name: taiwan-stock-ticker
description: 台股新聞追蹤器 - Taiwan Stock News Ticker with AI Sentiment Analysis
author: jerwe00149

scripts.api: uv run --with fastapi --with uvicorn --with pydantic-settings --with requests uvicorn backend.api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

data_sources.ai_analysis: Multi-Agent Framework (local, no API key needed)

agents.agent_1: Fundamental Analyst - 基本面分析師
agents.agent_2: Technical Analyst - 技術面分析師 (RSI/MACD/Bollinger)
agents.agent_3: Positioning Analyst - 籌碼與結構分析師 (WHO-WHOM-WHAT)
agents.agent_4: Sentiment Analyst - 市場情緒分析師 (Fear/Greed Index)
agents.lead_trader: Lead Trader & Synthesizer - 交易經理
